Hero.description: Automate payroll, attendance, recruitment, onboarding, and employee management from one platform. Built for growing businesses in India, UAE, Qatar, and Australia.

Analytics.title: Dynamic 3D Analytics Dashboard
Analytics.description: Visualize your hiring velocity, candidate match rates, and geographic talent distribution in real-time. Our interactive dashboard floating in 3D space provides unparalleled insights into your workforce.

Compliance.title: Built for Global Standards, Localized for Compliance
Compliance.subtitle: Airborne HRS adapts automatically to regional regulations, payroll compliance, and data laws across key operational markets.
Compliance.indiaDesc: Full integration with Provident Fund (PF), Employee State Insurance (ESI), TDS tax calculations, and 2023 DPDPA data privacy compliance.
Compliance.australiaDesc: Optimized for Single Touch Payroll (STP Phase 2), automated Superannuation contributions, and Fair Work Act award compliance.
Compliance.gulfDesc: Native Wage Protection System (WPS) integrations, Ministry of Labour reporting, and automated end-of-service gratuity calculations.
Compliance.globalDesc: Multi-currency payroll engine, automated localization templates, and secure GDPR-compliant global team onboarding.
